====================================
Punam Entertainment Presents
Punam Gautam’s 

MARUNI color of life

►Cast: Puspa Khadka, Samragyee RL Shah, Rebika Gurung, Sampada Baniya, Aayush Pradhan, Arjun Shrestha, Shankar Sedai, Binod Bhattarai, Sushil Chhetri

snippet.title: Nepali Serial Juthe (जुठे) Episode 1 || March 17-2021 By Raju Poudel Marichman Shrestha
snippet.description:
Master TV Presents:-
Juthe is a social television serial that portrays a story about the Dalits emancipation movement against these oppression, the heroes of the movement and future vision for the emancipation. It is aired in Himalaya Television at 8:00 PM and in YouTube at 9:00 PM every Wednesday.

Actor 
Rabi Giri
Bidhya Karki
Rambabu Regmi
Mukunda Mainali
Sarmila Sharma
Raju Poudel
Marichman Shrestha
Unisha Dhungana
Sowinika Bastola
Rukmila Adhikari
Dipendra Timilsina
Gokul BC
Pratigya Bhandari

Musician
Yogesh Kaji

Camera 
Rahul Rai, Ghanshyam Pokharel

Editor
Rabin Bhatta

Mekup Artist
Nirmala Acharya

Writer/ director
Raju Poudel, Marichman Shrestha




#Juthe #JutheEpisode1 #JutheNepaliSocialSerial
© Master TV

-Social Link:-

snippet.title: सेन्मिखाको कथा । Senmikhako Katha । Herne  Katha EP52 । हेर्ने कथा
snippet.description:
वर्षौंपछि पनि याद आइरहने सेन्मिखालाई भेट्न हामी फेरि चखेवा गयौं । क्षितिजलाई अँगालो हालेर बसेको लोभलाग्दा डाँडा, सल्लाघारी अनि भेडा चर्ने पाटनहरु सम्झिँदै । अनि सम्झिँदै त्यो एकान्तमा वनपाखा गुन्जाउने सेन्मिखाका भाकाहरुलाई 
#Senmikha #HerneKatha

Story of Senmikha, a young shepherd  from Chakhewa, Bhojpur. 


Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCZuKpNyipL9W-OkKwCMwVNQ/join

========================
💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️ Support Us 💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️
Herne Katha relies on our audience to continue our unique and creative storytelling. You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
🙏 Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


👀👀👀 Herne Katha 👀👀👀
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on 1st and 15th of every month on YouTube. 


🚀🚀🚀 Production Team 🚀🚀🚀
🎥 Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (https://www.facebook.com/jeevan.rijal.58)
👩 Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (https://twitter.com/cbidhya)
🎬 Director - Kamal Kumar (https://twitter.com/qamalqumar)


👍👍👍 Follow Herne Katha 👍👍👍
👉 IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
👉 Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
👉 Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
👉 Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
👉 Website: https://hernekatha.com


🌎🌎🌎 Make our Episodes Global 🌎🌎🌎
Please contribute English (or any other language) subtitles to our video: http://bit.ly/hernekathasubs    


💌💌💌 Share your Story 💌💌💌 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 


💲💲💲 For Advertisers 💲💲💲 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email. 


📺📺📺 For Broadcasters 📺📺📺
If you represent a radio or TV and want to broadcast Herne Katha on your platform, please write us an email. hello@hernekatha.com 


🎶🎶🎶 For Singers and Musicians 🎶🎶🎶 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


🎨🎨🎨 For all Creatives 🎨🎨🎨
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


😢😢😢 Sorry 😢😢😢 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

🙏 Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


👀👀👀 Herne Katha 👀👀👀
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on 1st and 15th of every month on YouTube. 


🚀🚀🚀 Production Team 🚀🚀🚀
🎥 Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (https://www.facebook.com/jeevan.rijal.58)
👩 Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (https://twitter.com/cbidhya)
🎬 Director - Kamal Kumar (https://twitter.com/qamalqumar)


👍👍👍 Follow Herne Katha 👍👍👍
👉 IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
👉 Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
👉 Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
👉 Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
👉 Website: https://hernekatha.com


🌎🌎🌎 Make our Episodes Global 🌎🌎🌎
Please contribute English (or any other language) subtitles to our video: http://bit.ly/hernekathasubs    


💌💌💌 Share your Story 💌💌💌 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 


💲💲💲 For Advertisers 💲💲💲 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email. 


📺📺📺 For Broadcasters 📺📺📺
If you represent a radio or TV and want to broadcast Herne Katha on your platform, please write us an email. hello@hernekatha.com 


🎶🎶🎶 For Singers and Musicians 🎶🎶🎶 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


🎨🎨🎨 For all Creatives 🎨🎨🎨
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


😢😢😢 Sorry 😢😢😢 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

snippet.title: MARJANEYA - Neha Kakkar | Rubina Dilaik & Abhinav Shukla | Anshul Garg | Babbu | Rajat Nagpal
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Marjaneya by Neha Kakkar ft. Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik.

Stream the full song here:

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/marjaneya-1
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/0fZJoLBwD8ja2Hg8tCPImu?si=Uv0zhihaQxSy2b2MoZZMDw&utm_source=whatsapp

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/in/album/marjaneya-single/1558134197?at=1l3v9Tx&uo=4&app=itunes
YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=rmc8ijIKpxY&feature=share


Singer - Neha Kakkar
Music - Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics - Babbu
Music arranged & produced by Rajat Nagpal 
Guitars Shomu Seal 
Recorded @ Studio 504 by Rahul Sharma Assist by Samir Dharap

Featuring - Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Co-Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Choreographer - Sumit Kumar 
Assistant Choreographer- Robin Singh
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
VFX - Prathmesh Chaukekar​ ,Prathmesh Sampada Parab 
Art Director - Karma Art Studio 
Jimmy Jib - Manish Arora
Production - Fateh Film Production
Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik Stylist - Ashna Makhijani Shah
Neha's team:
Styled by - Outro  By Akshita & Anulika
Make-up - Ritika Vats
Hair by - Rita Shukla
Photo by - Piyush Mehra
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital



Lyrics -
Karda rahen ignore ve mainu
Labhgyi lagda hor ve tenu
Je tu pyar naal rakhna hi nahi 
Fer tu vapis tor ve mainu
Ik paasa karde yaar.. Asi tere nahi rehna
Marjaaneya tu hun nahi karda pyar..Asi tere nahi rehna

Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda
Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda

Kade bahr laja
Koi film dikha
Kade pyar naal
Koi gal sunaa
Banya rehnaa talwar asi tere nai rehna
Marjaneya
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna

Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda
Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda

Sanu milna nahi 
Milauna nahi
Babbu je pyar
Jatauna nahi
Ki pauna fer achaar Asi tere nahi rehna
Marhanevala
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna



#NehaKakkar #RubinaDilaik #AbhinavShukla

snippet.title: Exclusive जापान लान्छु भन्दै लाखौ असुल्ने कमला प क्राउ|पत्रकार माथी पटकपटक हातपात|खुलेआम दादागिरी|
snippet.description:
Host:Ganga lama
Edit/Camera: Man Ghising
हामि समाजमा,देशमा घटेका बिभिन्न घटनाहरुलाई सत्य र निस्पक्क्ष ढंगले तपाइँ सामु ल्याउने छौ साथै विभिन्न कलाकारहरु संगको रोचक सम्बाद हेर्नको लागि कृपया हाम्रो च्यानल GOOD TV लाइ SUBSCRIBE गर्न नभुल्नु होला धन्यबाद !!!
Note- के तपाईसंग पनि केहि अनौठो कला छ ?, तपाई नजिकका व्यक्ति पो त्यस्तो प्रतिभावान हुनुहुन्छ कि ?, या समाजमा कोहि अन्यायमा परेको, असक्त, दुखि  ,पिडित पो हुनुहुन्छ कि ? यदि छ या देख्नुभयो भने हाम्रो सम्पर्क नम्बर 9849148126 मा सम्पर्क गरि सामाजिक दायित्व पुरा गरौ, पिडितलाई राहत दिलाउन आजै बाट हातेमालो गरौl  
यस च्यानलमा रहेका Video हरु कपि, Download गरी अन्य Channel मा upload गरेको पाएमा प्रचलित कानुन बमोजिम कडा भन्दा कडा कारबाही गरिनेछ ।
हामि समाजमा,देशमा घटेका बिभिन्न घटनाहरुलाई सत्य र निस्पक्क्ष ढंगले तपाइँ सामु ल्याउने छौ। 
#भिडियो_अन्तिम_सम्म_हेरि_सेयर_गर्नुहोला ।

 के तपाईसंग पनि केहि अनौठो कला छ ?, तपाई नजिकका व्यक्ति पो त्यस्तो प्रतिभावान हुनुहुन्छ कि ?, या समाजमा कोहि अन्यायमा परेको, असक्त, दुखि  ,पिडित पो हुनुहुन्छ कि ? यदि छ या देख्नुभयो भने हाम्रो सम्पर्क नम्बर +9779808074106 सन्तोष पौडेल लाइ सम्पर्क गरि सामाजिक दायित्व पुरा गरौ, पिडितलाई राहत दिलाउन आजै बाट हातेमालो गरौ l

snippet.title: ROSÉ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down
I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though

On the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though
Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.title: Comedy Champion Season 2 - Grand Premiere Episode 05
snippet.description:
Comedy Champion Season 2  Grand Premiere Episode 05

a super successful Season 1, we are back to sweep you off your feet and make your stomachs ache. Comedy Champion Season 2! 

The judges for the show are Legendary Artist Santosh Pant, Popular Stand-Up Comedian Manoj Gajurel, Celebrated Director Pradip Bhattarai, and Talented Actress Reecha Sharma hosted by Prominent VJ Rima Bishwokarma.  

It’s a Three Production Presentation.

snippet.title: Teri Aadat | Siddharth Nigam | Anushka Sen | Abhi Dutt | New Hindi Song| Official Video| BLive Music
snippet.description:
Sanjay Kukreja and BLive Music presents new official video song Teri Aadat soulful vocal by ABHI DUTT featuring Siddharth Nigam and Anushka Sen. The lyrics are penned by Ishaan Khan and the music directed by Aishwarya Tripathi. Nitin Fcp & Nadeem Akhtar have directed the video. This latest song is created by Mahesh Kukreja.

snippet.title: ब्लैक बनाम पिंक फूड का स्वाद | 24 घंटों के लिए केवल 1 रंग में सब कुछ खाना! चुनौती Multi DO CHALLENGE
snippet.description:
आज  एक विशेष  दिन है , क्योंकि आज हम एक  चुनौती लेकर आएं है ,जिसमे   काले रंग के खिलाफ गुलाबी रंग  और गुलाबी के खिलाफ काला  होने जा रहा है। किसे पता यह कैसा होगा  ?? पर शुक्र है की  हमें बस  आराम से बैठ कर इस वीडियो का आनंद  लेना है।  तो चलो  देखते है यह शुरू होने वाला है।

क्या आपको एक या उससे ज़्यादा फायदेमंद लगे ये बहुत बढ़िया भाड़े? याद से इस धन को दोस्तों से बांटें इस वीडियो को शेयर कर के! और ऐसे और फायदेमंद हैक्स के लिए यू ट्यूब  चैनल Multi DO को सब्सक्राइब करना ना भूलें!


#funny #MultiDO #DIY

localized.title: ब्लैक बनाम पिंक फूड का स्वाद | 24 घंटों के लिए केवल 1 रंग में सब कुछ खाना! चुनौती Multi DO CHALLENGE
localized.description:
आज  एक विशेष  दिन है , क्योंकि आज हम एक  चुनौती लेकर आएं है ,जिसमे   काले रंग के खिलाफ गुलाबी रंग  और गुलाबी के खिलाफ काला  होने जा रहा है। किसे पता यह कैसा होगा  ?? पर शुक्र है की  हमें बस  आराम से बैठ कर इस वीडियो का आनंद  लेना है।  तो चलो  देखते है यह शुरू होने वाला है।

क्या आपको एक या उससे ज़्यादा फायदेमंद लगे ये बहुत बढ़िया भाड़े? याद से इस धन को दोस्तों से बांटें इस वीडियो को शेयर कर के! और ऐसे और फायदेमंद हैक्स के लिए यू ट्यूब  चैनल Multi DO को सब्सक्राइब करना ना भूलें!


#funny #MultiDO #DIY

snippet.title: Day Dreamer | Early Bird in Hindi-Urdu Episode 156 | Erkenci Kus | Turkish Dramas
snippet.description:
Daydreamer Episode 156 in Hindi Dubbed

Erkenci Kus - Day Dreamer - Early Bird All Sections → https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6k9rnpOIGkc&list=PLcV4EBCzIde4e0PhB9b_7fZrJEfQJTybI

Sanem is an ambitious girl who dreams of becoming a great writer someday. However, her wings are cut when her family presents her with two choices. Her mother forces Salem to marry Muzzafar, their neighbour. The only way to avoid marriage is if Sanem finds herself a decent job. At such short notice, Salem starts working in an advertising firm. Not only that solves her problem at home but she also meets the love of her life at her new workplace. However, little does she know that she has walked right into a bigger trap. Will Sanem find a place for herself in the fancy corporate world? Will the glam of the corporate world make her turn a blind eye on her dream? 

#DayDreamer #EarlyBird #ErkenciKus #Episode156 #TurkishSeries

snippet.title: DON 2 FULL MOVIE | SHAH RUKH KHAN
snippet.description:
DON 2 FULL MOVIE | SHAH RUKH KHAN

Don 2 (also known as Don: The King Is Back) is a 2011 Indian Hindi-language action thriller film written, co-produced and directed by Farhan Akhtar. It is the second installment in the Don series. Jointly produced by Excel Entertainment and Red Chillies Entertainment, the film stars Shah Rukh Khan, Priyanka Chopra, Lara Dutta, Om Puri, Boman Irani and Kunal Kapoor. A sequel to the 2006 film Don (2006), Don 2 takes place five years after the previous film when titular character (Khan) plans to take over the European drug cartel. Meanwhile, Roma (Chopra) has joined the Interpol to hunt him down.

The film's music was composed by Shankar–Ehsaan–Loy, while Javed Akhtar wrote the lyrics. Jason West served as the film's cinematographer and Ritesh Soni was its editor. After the success of the first film, Akhtar had planned a sequel in 2010 which did not work out. It was then officially announced in early 2010, with filming scheduled to begin in later that year. Principal photography took place in Berlin, where it was shot extensively.

Don 2 was released on 23 December 2011 in 2D and 3D formats, which also included dubbed versions in Telugu and Tamil languages. The film had a mixed to positive reception from critics, receiving praise for the cast's performance, cinematography, production design and action sequences. However, its pace and music received criticism. With a box office gross of over ₹275.97 crore (US$39 million), Don 2 was a Big box office success. At the time of its release, the film was one of the highest-grossing Indian films of all time and is the highest-grossing Indian film of 2011. The film received a number of accolades across various ceremonies in India. The film received five nominations at the 57th Filmfare Awards, including Best Film, Best Director for Akhtar and Best Actor for Khan, winning Best Sound Design and Best Action.

Directed by Farhan Akhtar
Produced by Farhan Akhtar
Ritesh Sidhwani
Shah Rukh Khan
Screenplay by Farhan Akhtar
Ameet Mehta
Amrish Shah
Starring Shah Rukh Khan
Priyanka Chopra
Lara Dutta
Kunal Kapoor
Boman Irani
Om Puri
Music by Shankar–Ehsaan–Loy
Cinematography Jason West
Edited by Anand Subaya
Production
companies 
Excel Entertainment
Red Chillies Entertainment
Distributed by Reliance Entertainment
Release date 
23 December 2011 (India)

snippet.title: Splitsvilla Season 13 | The Girls Meet The Boys | Ep. 01 | Highlights
snippet.description:
Nikhil gets the golden arrow from Riya. Gary gets the golden arrow from Avantika. Samruddhi chooses Kevin for her golden arrow. Azma gives her silver arrow to Shivam. Dhruv gets Palak's silver arrow. When the sticking game ends, Kevin comes out with the most number of arrows.

#SplitsvillaSeason13

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCGkavJ5sNmDBRFzb4QqiLwA?sub_confirmation=1

snippet.title: The Big Bull: Official Trailer | Abhishek B, Ileana D, Nikita D, Sohum S | Kookie Gulati | 8th April
snippet.description:
This was not just another scam... it was the mother of all scams! Presenting the official trailer of #TheBigBull, starring Abhishek. A. Bachchan, Ileana D'Cruz, Nikita Dutta, Soham Shah, Ram Kapoor, Supriya Pathak, Saurabh Shukla and Mahesh Manjrekar in a special appearance. The film is set to releasing on 8th April 2021.

Director: Kookie Gulati
Produced by: Ajay Devgn & Anand Pandit
Co-producer: Kumar Mangat Pathak & Vikrant Sharma
CEO: Meena K Iyer
Written by: Kookie Gulati & Arjun Dhawan
Dialogues: Ritesh Shah
DOP: Vishnu Rao
Editor: Dharmendra Sharma
Music Director: Gourov Dasgupta, Mehul Vyas, Wily Frenzy
Production Designer: Durgaprasad Mahapatra
Costume Designer: Darshan Jalan & Neelanchal
Casting Director: Shruti Mahajan

#TheBigBullTrailer #AbhishekBachchan #IleanaDCruz #AjayDevgn #NikitaDutta #SohamShah #RamKapoor #SupriyaPathak #SaurabhShukla #DisneyPlusHotstarMultiplex #MotherOfAllScams

snippet.title: म मरेर जाउँला तर देशको सीमा त सधै रहन्छ नि ! - Manisha Koirala | TAMASOMA JYOTIRGAMAYA | AP1HD
snippet.description:
Tamasoma Jyotirgamaya is one of the most popular television talk shows in the nation. As the name suggests it is an effort to explore the true knowledge on the national and international affairs that matter to the communities and the human race as a whole. The guests of the shows include top political leaderships and renowned figures from different walks of life, mostly associated with the contested affairs. The host of the show is Mr. Tikaram Yatri, the editor-in-chief of AP1HD Television. The broadcast time of the show is Monday (9 to 10 PM).

एपीवानबाट प्रत्येक सोमबार बेलुका ९ बजे प्रसारण हुने तमसो मा ज्योतिर्गमय सकारात्मक सोच,सम्भावना र उज्यालोको खोजी गर्ने बहुचर्चित टेलिभिजन अन्तर्वार्ता हो । जीवन भोगाइका बहुआयामिक रंगको इन्द्रेणी यस कार्य्रक्रममा जुनसुकै क्षेत्रका विज्ञ विष्लेषक तथा उदाहरणीय पात्रलाई अतिथिका रूपमा निम्त्याउने गरिन्छ । राष्ट्रियता र स्वाभिमानको पक्षमा कुनै सम्झौता नगरी विकास र परिवर्तनको पक्षमा आवाज मुखरित गर्नु यस कार्यक्रमको मुख्य उद्देश्य हो ।

Presenter: Tikaram Yatri
Guest: Manisha Koirala

Researcher: Saroj Gautam
Producer:  Phurba Sherpa
Program Co-Ordinator : Kamala Subedi
Social Media Executive: Krishna Karki

Editor: Sunil Shrestha
Music: Raprabin Shrestha

Studio Producer: Chiranjibi Gautam and Subash Thapa

Camera Person
Navaraj Adhikari
Gopinath KC
Surendra Maskey

Graphics: Lokesh Bajracharya/ Ramesh Thapa /Bibek Shrestha

MCR

Rabi Raj Paudel
Manish Shrestha
Pradip Rijal
David Shah
Pramod koirala

snippet.title: Master Ji Ka Bhoot - Amit Bhadana
snippet.description:
Do badmash students ne kar rakha hai apne master ji ki naak mein dum aur is duniya mein nahi hai unka koi bhi ilaaj. Par kya karenge vo dono jab master ji dosari duniya se mangne ayenge jawaab? Is kahani mein hum aapko parlok ki sair karayenge, thoda sa darr lagega par bahut sara hansayenge. Masterji ki class mein attendance lagao aur bakiyon ko bhi le kar aao.

snippet.title: Day Dreamer | Early Bird in Hindi-Urdu Episode 157 | Erkenci Kus | Turkish Dramas
snippet.description:
Daydreamer Episode 157 in Hindi Dubbed

Erkenci Kus - Day Dreamer - Early Bird All Sections → https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6k9rnpOIGkc&list=PLcV4EBCzIde4e0PhB9b_7fZrJEfQJTybI

Sanem is an ambitious girl who dreams of becoming a great writer someday. However, her wings are cut when her family presents her with two choices. Her mother forces Salem to marry Muzzafar, their neighbour. The only way to avoid marriage is if Sanem finds herself a decent job. At such short notice, Salem starts working in an advertising firm. Not only that solves her problem at home but she also meets the love of her life at her new workplace. However, little does she know that she has walked right into a bigger trap. Will Sanem find a place for herself in the fancy corporate world? Will the glam of the corporate world make her turn a blind eye on her dream? 

#DayDreamer #EarlyBird #ErkenciKus #Episode157 #TurkishSeries

snippet.description:
यक्ष प्रश्न हिमालय टेलिभिजन बाट हरेक आइतबार र बुधबार बेलुका ९ बजे प्रसारण हुने र समसामयिक विषयका बारेमा उक्त बिषयमा बिशेष दखल राख्ने व्यक्तित्व संग गरिने टेलिभिजन अन्तर्वार्ता  हो।  कार्यक्रम प्रस्तोता राजेन्द्र बानिया लोकप्रिय टिभी जर्नालिस्ट हुनुहुन्छ |

snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

snippet.title: मरिसकेको मान्छे । The Man Who Died Once । Herne Katha EP-51 । हेर्ने कथा
snippet.description:
Award winning documentary (KIMFF 2018) The Man Who Died Once (Marisakeko Manchhe), directed by  Bidhya Chapagain and Kamal Kumar, releasing for the first time on Herne Katha. 
#HerneKatha #TheManWhoDiedOnce #MarisakekoManchhe

मरिसकेको मान्छे
पश्चिम नेपालकी वृद्ध आमा सुर्विता भण्डारीको पूर्वी नेपालको सन्तोषी तामाङको परिवारसँग भएको अकल्पनीय सम्बन्धको तानाबाना । वैदेशिक रोजगारीले दुईवटा अन्जान परिवारमा निम्त्याएको चलचित्र जस्तै लाग्ने घटनाहरुको नालीबेली । 
'मरिसकेको मान्छे' सन् २०१८ मा हेर्ने कथाका विद्या चापागाई र कमल कुमारले उज्यालो मल्टिमिडियाको सहकार्यमा निर्देशन गरेको वृत्तचित्र हो । यस वृत्तचित्र सोही वर्षको काठमाडौं अन्तर्राष्ट्रिय चलचित्र महोत्सवमा नेपाली विधामा उत्कृष्ट भएको थियो । 

हेर्ने कथाको ५१ औं अंकको रुपमा पहिलो पटक 'मरिसकेको मान्छे' सार्वजनिक गर्दैछौं ।

The Man Who Died Once
Two families from different parts of Nepal, unknown to each other, are connected by a fatal road accident in Saudi Arabia. 'Marisakeko Manchhe' (The Man Who Died Once) is a story of life and death, unimaginable sorrows, surprises and some measure of comfort and happiness.

Best Documentary Award Winner of Kathmandu International Mountain Film Festival (KIMFF 2018)

More articles and updates on this story can be found in the link below: https://ujyaaloonline.com/story/24135

localized.title: मरिसकेको मान्छे । The Man Who Died Once । Herne Katha EP-51 । हेर्ने कथा
localized.description:
Award winning documentary (KIMFF 2018) The Man Who Died Once (Marisakeko Manchhe), directed by  Bidhya Chapagain and Kamal Kumar, releasing for the first time on Herne Katha. 
#HerneKatha #TheManWhoDiedOnce #MarisakekoManchhe

मरिसकेको मान्छे
पश्चिम नेपालकी वृद्ध आमा सुर्विता भण्डारीको पूर्वी नेपालको सन्तोषी तामाङको परिवारसँग भएको अकल्पनीय सम्बन्धको तानाबाना । वैदेशिक रोजगारीले दुईवटा अन्जान परिवारमा निम्त्याएको चलचित्र जस्तै लाग्ने घटनाहरुको नालीबेली । 
'मरिसकेको मान्छे' सन् २०१८ मा हेर्ने कथाका विद्या चापागाई र कमल कुमारले उज्यालो मल्टिमिडियाको सहकार्यमा निर्देशन गरेको वृत्तचित्र हो । यस वृत्तचित्र सोही वर्षको काठमाडौं अन्तर्राष्ट्रिय चलचित्र महोत्सवमा नेपाली विधामा उत्कृष्ट भएको थियो । 

हेर्ने कथाको ५१ औं अंकको रुपमा पहिलो पटक 'मरिसकेको मान्छे' सार्वजनिक गर्दैछौं ।

The Man Who Died Once
Two families from different parts of Nepal, unknown to each other, are connected by a fatal road accident in Saudi Arabia. 'Marisakeko Manchhe' (The Man Who Died Once) is a story of life and death, unimaginable sorrows, surprises and some measure of comfort and happiness.

Best Documentary Award Winner of Kathmandu International Mountain Film Festival (KIMFF 2018)

More articles and updates on this story can be found in the link below: https://ujyaaloonline.com/story/24135

snippet.title: The Stolen Necklace | CID | Most Viewed
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

snippet.description:
Host:Ganga lama

Note- के तपाईसंग पनि केहि अनौठो कला छ ?, तपाई नजिकका व्यक्ति पो त्यस्तो प्रतिभावान हुनुहुन्छ कि ?, या समाजमा कोहि अन्यायमा परेको, असक्त, दुखि  ,पिडित पो हुनुहुन्छ कि ? यदि छ या देख्नुभयो भने हाम्रो सम्पर्क नम्बर 9849148126 मा सम्पर्क गरि सामाजिक दायित्व पुरा गरौ, पिडितलाई राहत दिलाउन आजै बाट हातेमालो गरौl  
यस च्यानलमा रहेका Video हरु कपि, Download गरी अन्य Channel मा upload गरेको पाएमा प्रचलित कानुन बमोजिम कडा भन्दा कडा कारबाही गरिनेछ ।
हामि समाजमा,देशमा घटेका बिभिन्न घटनाहरुलाई सत्य र निस्पक्क्ष ढंगले तपाइँ सामु ल्याउने छौ। 
#भिडियो_अन्तिम_सम्म_हेरि_सेयर_गर्नुहोला ।

snippet.title: तेज मध्यम या धीमी खाद्य चुनौती Multi DO Challenge
snippet.description:
आप आमतौर पर कैसे खाते हैं - धीमी, मध्यम या तेज गति से? हमें  कमेंट सेक्शन में बताएं  और  हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब  करें। हमारे  चैनल के साथ  जिंदगी  कभी  उबाऊ नहीं होगी  इसलिए हमारे  सभी  वीडियो को  देखें! अगली बार तक के लिए अलविदा !

क्या आपको एक या उससे ज़्यादा फायदेमंद लगे ये बहुत बढ़िया भाड़े? याद से इस धन को दोस्तों से बांटें इस वीडियो को शेयर कर के! और ऐसे और फायदेमंद हैक्स के लिए यू ट्यूब  चैनल Multi DO को सब्सक्राइब करना ना भूलें!


#funny #MultiDO #DIY

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal vs Tottenham Hotspur (2-1) | Premier League | Odegaard, Lacazette
snippet.description:
We came from a goal behind to deservedly win a dramatic north London derby.
It was no less than we deserved after a largely dominant performance, but we had to dig deep after Erik Lamela gave the visitors the lead.

Martin Odegaard levelled up before the break and captain for the day Alexandre Lacazette scored the winner from the penalty spot.

There were some late nervy moments - despite playing the last 15 minutes with an extra man after Lamela's red card - but we held on for a well-deserved confidence boosting win.

There's no doubt we made most of the early running, and we certainly were looking positive in possession, trying to mov the ball forward through the organised Tottenham rearguard.

Despite seeing plenty of the ball though, we didn't have a clear sight at goal until Emile Smith Rowe rattled the crossbar with a fine attempt from 20 yards. Hugo Lloris was well beaten in the visitors' goal, but the ball bounced away to safety.

Smith Rowe was the architect of our next chance, cutting the ball back from the byline to the lurking Alexandre Lacazette, but the Frenchman screwed his shot wide from six yards after attempting to open up his body and shoot across goal.

But our dominance began to fade and we were punished on the half hour. Lamela - an early replacement for Heung-Min Son - showed great technique to score inside the far post.

The goal was very much against the run of play, but we kept pushing and hit the woodwork for a second time when Cedric latched onto a loose ball just inside the box and crashed his effort against the upright.

We deserved to be on terms, and finally drew level late in the half through Odegaard. Kieran Tierney got away down the left, sent in a low cross which the Norwegian steered beyond Lloris via a deflection off Toby Alderweireld.

It was his second goal in four days after opening his account in Greece on Thursday.

It would have been an injustice to go in behind at the interval, and we continued to dictate the play early in the second half.

Nicolas Pepe was introduced for Bukayo Saka at the break, and the Ivorian's wonderful pass to Lacazette inside the box resulted in a penalty. Lacazette failed to make good contact with his shot, but was cleaned out by Davinson Sanchez. Referee Michael Oliver pointed to the spot and Lacazette himself dispatched.

Lamela saw red for an elbow on Tierney, but perversely the visitors improved after going down to ten men.

Harry Kane headed home a free-kick but was flagged offside as Spurs piled on the late pressure.

Kane then struck the post from a free-kick and Gabriel made a superb clearing header to keep out Sanchez's follow up strike.

It was nervy, but we held on for a thoroughly deserved victory.

#arsenal #arsenalhighlights #premierleague 

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

#RambahadurThapa_Badal_Prachanda_KpOli#

यो (Kharo online tv ),or Online tv, Kharo Media,(खरो अनलाइन टिभी) समाचार,  मनोरन्जन तथा ज्ञान दिनको लागी बनाइएको Youtube channel हो |यस च्यानल  मर्फत अपलोड गरिएको भिडियो, गीत संगीत आदी सबै Copy right मुक्त छैनन | कृपया कसैले पनि यहाँ भएका कुनै पनि सामाग्री प्रयोग नगरिदिनु होला अन्यथा Copy right आएमा  Kharo online TV जिम्मेवारी हुने छैन |
तापाँई सँग कुनै गीत गाउँने कला छ, कुनै नक्कल गर्ने कला छ, कभर डान्स गर्नु हुन्छ, अनि अरु नायाँ केहि अनौठो कला भएर पनि ओझेलामा पर्नु भएको छ?? यदी तेस्तो छ भने हामी तपाईंलाई स्थान दिने छौ

snippet.title: के जी एफ स्टार यश की नई रिलीज़ मूवी " मेरी जान " हिंदी डब में | नई साउथ एक्शन मूवी हिंदी में
snippet.description:
के जी एफ स्टार यश की नई रिलीज़ मूवी " मेरी जान " हिंदी डब में | नई साउथ एक्शन मूवी हिंदी में

Movie Title - Meri Jaan (Jaanu)
Starring - Yash, Deepa Sannidhi
Director - Preetham Gubbi
Genre - Hindi Action-Romance Movie

SYNOPSIS:
Meri Jaan (Jaanu) is a 2015 Hindi Dubbed action-romance film directed by Preetham Gubbi and produced by Jayanna combines. Yash and Deepa Sannidhi are the lead actors while Rangayana Raghu, Sadhu Kokila, Shobaraj among others play the supporting roles. V. Harikrishna is the score and soundtrack composer.

Casting:
Deepa Sannidhi, a much sought after actress with two hits in the last year - Saarathi and Paramathma is in her third film with Yash. Rangayana Raghu, Shobaraj, Sangeetha, Madhu, Sadhu Kokila, Layendra are also in the supporting cast.

Box Office:
Jaanu was a much anticipated film and got a good opening at the box office, due to hit songs and youth fan following of Yash. But the film met with mixed response upon release, although it went on to be commercially successful at the box office by completing 50 days of run.

Development:
Following the debacle of Haage Summane and success of Johny Mera Naam Preethi Mera Kaam, Preetham Gubbi teamed up yet again with the Jayanna combines banner. Jayanna and Bogendra were producers for his earlier films too.

#yash #yashhindidubbedmovie #yashnewmovie #2021

snippet.title: Sajjan Raj Vaidya - Lukaamaari [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
We identify love as a noun and we experience it as a verb. This song is one that speaks of love as an action rather than the decoration of an idea with words. When everything is a cliché and every metaphor is mundane, the only way to truly communicate love is through action. As words escape our sights and play hide and seek with us, we discover new ways to speak love. "Lukaamaari" is the story of such a discovery.

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 07 March 2021 at 9:00 PM

snippet.title: MahaShivRatri 2021 – Live Webstream with Sadhguru | 11 Mar, 6 PM - 12 Mar, 6 AM IST
snippet.description:
Celebrate Mahashivratri 2021 with Sadhguru on 11 March 2021, starting at 6 pm IST/12:30 pm GMT.

Help take Mahashivratri to millions of people.
Donate at https://isha.co/msr-support 
-------------------------------------------
What to look forward to this year:

1. Watch Sadhguru consecrate Rudraksha beads which will be distributed to more than a million seekers across the world.

2. Get inspired and spellbound by Adiyogi Divya Darshanam, a 3D projection show unveiling the story of the first Yogi.

3. Participate in the powerful Midnight Meditation and Satsang with Sadhguru.

4. Enjoy the music and dance performances by renowned artists, the breathtaking fire dance, and much more.

00:00:00 MahaShivRatri 2021 starts with Linga Bhairavi Procession
01:00:00 Sounds of Isha Performance
01:02:00 Linga Bhairavi Maha Arathi
01:26:18 Sadhguru Welcome Address
01:36:22 Sounds of Isha
02:04:26 Sounds of Isha with Mangli
02:37:49 Isha Samskriti
03:04:00 Chant with Sadhguru
03:15:34 Sandeep Narayan Performance
03:56:00 Kutle Khan Performance
04:58:00 Rudraksha consecration with Sadhguru
05:14:00 Sadhguru Discourse
06:01:40 Midnight Meditation
06:35:20 Adiyogi Divya Darshan
06:53:13 Q&A with Sadhguru
07:25:00 Shambho Meditation
08:07:40 Sounds of Isha
08:18:47 Thappu Drummers
08:29:00 Kabir Café
09:31:50 Sounds of Isha
10:01:45 Manasi Parekh Gohil Performance
10:13:16 Parthiv Gohil Performance
10:39:48 Anthony Dasan
11:12:24 Sadhguru - Free Tamil Temples
11:28:32 Sounds of Isha
11:51:53 Closing with Sadhguru

-------------------------------------------------------------
Help take Mahashivratri to millions of people.
Donate  at  https://isha.co/msr-support 
--------------------------------------------------------------
#MahaShivRatri2021
Mahashivratri is one of the largest and most significant among the sacred festivals of India and a night of immense spiritual possibilities for any spiritual seeker."
#Sadhguru
Yogi, mystic and visionary, Sadhguru is a spiritual master with a difference. An arresting blend of profundity and pragmatism, his life and work serves as a reminder that yoga is a contemporary science, vitally relevant to our times. 
----------------------------------------
Help take Mahashivratri to millions of people.
Donate  at https://isha.co/msr-support 

----------------------------------------
'Karma: A Yogi's Guide to Crafting Destiny.' - A book by Sadhguru

Pre-order Now: https://sadhguru.org/karma

Available everywhere: April 27, 2021
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
In the Grace of Yoga” with Sadhguru is a unique Yoga program that offers an in-depth exploration of the five elements (earth, water, air, fire, and space), their significance, their manifestation within us and an opportunity to learn powerful tools for their purification. By purifying and mastering the five elements, or pancha bhutas, you can bring your body and mind to a vibrant state of health and rejuvenation.  

The program is available in two formats. ( Register now ) 
  3-day online program: March 9-11, 2021
  1-day online program: March 11, 2021  
⚡ https://isha.co/GOY-YT⚡
------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: (2021) New Released Hindi Dubbed Official Movie with English Subtitles- Virginia, Chaithra, Balaji M
snippet.description:
Titel Lady Gangster Mahira (. Dubbed From Kannad Movie Mahira )
(2021) MAHIRA New Released South Hindi Dubbed  Movie 
Producer                    Surinder Yadav
Creative Producer;   Mahendra Yadav
Director:                    Mahesh Gowda

snippet.title: Lavanya Tripathi New Released Full Hindi Dubbed | South Indian Movie Dubbed in Hindi Full Movie 2021
snippet.description:
The film starts with the death of a renowned neurologist named Pramodh (R. Amarendran). His gym trainer Dheena (Sai Dheena) is seen paying respects at the funeral before leaving. The plot then shifts to a young crime inspector named Kumaran (Sundeep Kishan), who is chasing a petty thief and witnesses Dheena murdering his wife. Kumaran chases Dheena, who corners him and halts him with a blow to his head. In an ensuing tussle, Kumaran manages to kill Dheena.

A meeting with psychiatrist Aadhirai (Lavanya Tripathi) ends on a rough note when she deems him medically unfit to rejoin the police force. Later, when he faces symptoms which attribute to PTSD, he mends his ways with Aadhirai, who helps him overcome his disorder. A second murder happens in which a famous actress, Vishma (Akshara Gowda) is killed. Kumaran visits the spot and gets stressed and shocked upon finding the similar blood stains from the earlier murder and the same brand of cigarette smoked by the murderer. Aadhirai finds him, treats him for his PTSD, and makes him normal. Kumaran meets with Rudhran (Daniel Balaji) and introduces Aadhirai to him as a motivational speaker. Kumaran, now fitter, sets out his investigation and finds that a makeup man named Gopi (Mime Gopi) must have done the murder as he is the prime suspect. Upon investigation, he gets to know that Gopi and Dheena showed a totally different behavior a few days before they committed the murders. Kumaran tracks down Gopi, but he jumps to his death before confessing anything.

Subscribe Us - http://goo.gl/vmw18Y

Like Us on FB - https://www.facebook.com/wamindiamovies

G+ - https://plus.google.com/+WAMIndiaMovies

snippet.title: Panghat – Roohi | Rajkummar – Janhvi - Varun | Sachin- Jigar, Amitabh B | Asees Kaur
snippet.description:
Panghat, a scintillating party number, is sung by Asees Kaur and Divya Kumar. Music is by our favourite duo, Sachin – Jigar and Rap by Mellow D, beautifully penned by Amitabh Bhattacharya. Come be a part of this Bhootiya Shaadi! 

#Roohi #Panghat #Janhvi

Listen to Panghat on JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/panghat-from-roohi/GwkZVgFnW3g

Also listen on:

Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/2g8fA9Ijc3sAlfkQFlYxsf?si=UYQN_L3uQ6i8GZjFA5KVeA&utm_source=whatsapp
Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/panghat-from-roohi
Amazon prime music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08X3NH8HJ?trackAsin=B08X3MX1P1&ref=dm_sh_4tqolTG0zNYeUeiswLbAMLYYz
Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJeGyKmK/
Wynk music - https://wynk.in/u/EsLKwTcwf 
Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/panghat-from-roohi-single/1554475918?ls
Roposo - https://www.roposo.com/createpost?audio=e8c97b13-e555-4b68-9ce0-db4ae43e70c0


Song – Panghat 
Film - Roohi
Music Composer - Sachin - Jigar
Lyricist - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singer - Asees Kaur, Divya Kumar , Sachin- Jigar
Rap by Mellow D 
Arranged & Programmed - Sachin- Jigar
Assistant Programmers - Hrishikesh Gangan & Abhishek Singh
Music Production Head - Romil Ved
Mix & Mastered - Eric Pillai & FSOB Studios
Assistant Mix Engineer - Michael Edwin Pillai

Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma 
Directed by: Hardik Mehta 
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba 
Music by: Sachin-Jigar
A Jio Studios Release
By Maddock Films 

Lyrics :- 
JULMI BADI AUKAT PE YE RAAT AAYI HAIMANN TO HAI MERA PAWANMAGAR 
YOVAN HARJAI HAIO kAISE HO MILAN BAANKE PIYA SE JAAN MERI ATKI

BAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIBAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIBAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KI

PANGHATPE GAT GAT KARKE PEETI REHTI PEETI REHTISAWARIYA BIN SAJNA KE JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTIPANGHATPE GAT GAT KARKE PEETI REHTI PEETI REHTISAWARIYA BIN SAJNA KE JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI

(RAP)PATATI PATAH PATAANTIKYU TU ITNA BANTIGHANA ATTITUDE GHAMANDIPAR BANEGI TU MERI BANDIKYUKI NAZAROON MAI JABSE TU AATKI ATKIBHUDDHI HAI MERI THODI SATKI SATKIKAMARIYA TERI MATKI MATKIDIL KARE FOOD DOON MAI FATAKI FATAKI PAR

(ANTRA)
O SAIYAAN BAABUJI BUMBAIYATERI BUTTERFALAIYAKABSE BAITHI TERI RAAH TAAKE

DAAAIYA APNE PYAAR KI NAAIYABEECH BHAVAR MAI NAAIYAPAAR LAGA JOGAN KE BAAGH JAGE

O MERI FULJADIYO RESABAR ZARA KARIYO RE

HAANSABAR KARTE HUE KITNA BHARUUN MAIHANDPUMP SE MATKI

BAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KI
PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI
PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI
PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI
BAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KI
PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI
PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI
PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI
BAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KI
PANGHATPE GAT GATKARKE PEETI REHTI PEETI REHTI
SAWARIYA BIN SAJNA KE JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI

snippet.title: लेटेस्ट नई रिलीज़ मूवी " यौद्धा "हिंदी डब में | नई साउथ एक्शन मूवी हिंदी में |भारत,मीरा स्टोरी दर्शन
snippet.description:
Watch this Bollywood Hindi Action Movie "Nepali The Warrior" (dubbed from Tamil Superhit film "Nepali") starring Bharat, Meera Jasmine, Govind Namdeo. 

Synopsis-
The movie revolves around Karthik (Bharath), a software engineer. He comes across Priya (Meera Jasmine) in a hill station. After formal acquaintance, love blossoms between them.
As usual, the girl family protests their affair. Eventually, the couple walks out of the house and get married. They face trouble in the form of a greedy and sexual maniac police officer. He lusts on Priya. When he tries to molest her, she gets killed. The blame falls on Karthik.
He kills the police officer and goes to jail, where he meets a Nepali social worker (Govind Namdeo), who voices for women harassed in the workplace. Inspired by the Nepali, Karthik comes out of the prison to punish those who misbehave with women at the workplace. He bumps off a computer engineer, a professor and a doctor dressed as a Nepali youth.
DCP Gautham (Prem) takes up the task of cracking the serial murders. Does he manage to pin down Karthik forms the crux?

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Ep 3122 - Full Episode - 15th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3122: 
-----------------------
While Gokuldham members enter the society gate dancing, Chalu Pandey sees them and makes them stop because Bhogilal had called him and filed a false complaint against Jethalal. Chalu Pandey questions Jethalal and others and takes Bhogilal's side. Jetha explains to him the entire scenario and proven Pandey Ji the video. What will happen next? Watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Gangubai Kathiawadi | Official Teaser | Sanjay Leela Bhansali, Alia Bhatt | 30th July 2021
snippet.description:
Gangubai Kathiawadi - A story, based on the book “ Mafia Queens of Mumbai” written by  S. Hussain Zaidi, is a film that celebrates the rise of a simple girl from Kathiawad who had no choice but to embrace the ways of destiny and swing it in her favour.

The narrative walks through the life of young Ganga who in no time marks her own territory and becomes Gangubai – The Matriarch of Kamathipura.

Once again, Sanjay Leela Bhansali brings to his audience a moving yet stem-winding story with power-packed performances laced in his magical musical notes.
With a promise to make one and all feel inspired in 2021 as Gangubai Kathiawadi celebrates the journey of a girl who became the voice for women empowerment.

Bhansali Productions & PEN Studios  Present
A Film by Sanjay Leela Bhansali
Produced by: Sanjay Leela Bhansali & Dr. Jayantilal Gada (Pen Studios)

In Cinemas: July 30, 2021

snippet.title: Baalveer Returns - Ep 309 - Full Episode - 26th February, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of Baalveer Returns: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Yx-rSymwv5NSIsaQ0RwDK_

Episode 309: Vivan Became Unconscious
--------------------------------------------------------
Vivan became unconscious of the unknown Villen is trying to take all power of Vivan. Baalveer and Ananya successfully started the airplane and they are all set to leave the island. watch the full episode now.

About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games and lots of magic on earth and the respective loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

#baalveerreturns #baalveer

snippet.title: भुन्टी, कान्छी सिरियलकी मुकुली पहिलोपटक श्रीमान र छोरीसहित मिडियामा, एकअर्काको रहस्य खोल्दै हसाएRita
snippet.description:
भुन्टी कान्छीकी छुच्ची मुकुली पहिलोपटक श्रीमान र छोरीसहित मिडियामा, एकअर्काको पोल खोल्दै हँसाए

#LakeSide_TV_Nepal #Mukuli_Rita_Siwakoti_Family #Mukuli_Bhunti_Kanchhi


तपाइको समाज, छिमेक, वरपर, कुनैपनि घटना, समाचार, अन्यायमा परेर न्याय नपाएका व्यक्ति, कला र अचम्म अचम्मका प्रतिभा भएका व्यक्ति छन् भने हामीलाई सिधा सम्पर्क गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ |

र

तपाइँ गीत, संगीत र म्युजिक भिडियो सम्बन्धि सम्पूर्ण काम गर्न चाहनुहुन्छ र हाम्रो च्यानलमा म्युजिक भिडियो र भिडियो राख्न चाहनुहुन्छ भने पनि सम्पर्क गर्नुहोला | 


फेसबुकमा सिधै म्यासेज गर्नुहोस  - https://www.facebook.com/lakesideowner/
सिधा सम्पर्क - सिर्जना रोका 9821586635, 9863166978


you can message direct in this page -
facebook - https://www.facebook.com/lakesideowner/
Video Production and Making - LakeSide Production,  Kathmandu Nepal

snippet.title: 100 खाद्य परतें चुनौती #2 Multi DO Challenge
snippet.description:
हम जानते हैं, हम जानते हैं, आप भोजन से जुड़ी चुनौतियों से पूरी तरह से प्यार करते हैं और आज हम आपको कुछ ऐसी चीजें प्रदान कर रहे हैं जो आपको और भी अधिक स्वादिष्ट लगेंगी, भोजन की 100 परतें!

क्या आपको एक या उससे ज़्यादा फायदेमंद लगे ये बहुत बढ़िया भाड़े? याद से इस धन को दोस्तों से बांटें इस वीडियो को शेयर कर के! और ऐसे और फायदेमंद हैक्स के लिए यू ट्यूब  चैनल Multi DO को सब्सक्राइब करना ना भूलें!


#funny #MultiDO #DIY
